global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with geometric shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial service with a focus on clarity and ease of use.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle and a circle are centered, with a subtle outline, adding a modern design element.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your money, clearer' is prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message reads 'Fast signup, instant card', providing additional information.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small circular icon in the top left corner labeled 'UGC', indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now', encouraging user interaction.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Fast signup  instant card

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'ClearLedger' is displayed in bold at the top, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A clear and inviting button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now', designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
